lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਬਾਹਰਿ ਥਾਨ ਥਨੰਤਰਿ ਜਤ ਕਤ ਪੇਖਉ ਸੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: antar baahar thaan thanantar jat kat pekhau soee |
lines.english: Inwardly and outwardly, in all places and interspaces, wherever I look, He is there.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਜਪਿ ਸਦਾ ਨਿਹਾਲ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: paarabraham jap sadaa nihaal | rahaau |
lines.english: Meditating on the Supreme Lord God, I am forever in ecstasy. ||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੂਖ ਮੰਗਲ ਕਲਿਆਣ ਸਹਜ ਧੁਨਿ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕੇ ਚਰਣ ਨਿਹਾਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: sookh mangal kaliaan sehaj dhun prabh ke charan nihaariaa |
lines.english: I have been blessed with peace, pleasure, bliss, and the celestial sound current, gazing upon the feet of God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰੁ ਪਾਇਓ ਵਡਭਾਗੀ ਤਿਸੁ ਜੇਵਡੁ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਕੋਈ ॥੨॥੧੧॥੩੯॥
lines.translit: naanak gur paaeo vaddabhaagee tis jevadd avar na koee |2|11|39|
lines.english: Nanak has found the Guru, by great good fortune; no one else is as great as He. ||2||11||39||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਰਠਿ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: soratth mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Sorat'h, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਖਨਹਾਰੈ ਰਾਖਿਓ ਬਾਰਿਕੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਤਾਪੁ ਉਤਾਰਿਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: raakhanahaarai raakhio baarik satigur taap utaariaa |1|
lines.english: The Savior has saved His child, and the True Guru has cured his fever. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਰ ਮਹਿ ਸੂਖ ਬਾਹਰਿ ਫੁਨਿ ਸੂਖਾ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਅਪੁਨੇ ਭਏ ਦਇਆਲਾ ॥
lines.translit: ghar meh sookh baahar fun sookhaa prabh apune bhe deaalaa |
lines.english: There is peace within the home of one's heart, and there is peace outside as well, when God becomes kind and compassionate.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕੀ ਸੇਵ ਨ ਬਿਰਥੀ ਜਾਈ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kee sev na birathee jaaee | rahaau |
lines.english: service to Him does not go in vain. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਬਰੇ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਸਰਣਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: aubare satigur kee saranaaee |
lines.english: I have been saved, in the True Guru's Sanctuary;

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਬਿਘਨੁ ਨ ਲਾਗੈ ਕੋਊ ਮੇਰਾ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਹੋਆ ਕਿਰਪਾਲਾ ॥੨॥੧੨॥੪੦॥
lines.translit: naanak bighan na laagai koaoo meraa prabh hoaa kirapaalaa |2|12|40|
lines.english: O Nanak, no obstacles block my way; my God has become gracious and merciful to me. ||2||12||40||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਰਠਿ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: soratth mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Sorat'h, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧੂ ਸੰਗਿ ਭਇਆ ਮਨਿ ਉਦਮੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਰਤਨੁ ਜਸੁ ਗਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: saadhoo sang bheaa man udam naam ratan jas gaaee |
lines.english: In the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, my mind became excited, and I sang the Praises of the jewel of the Naam.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਟਿ ਗਈ ਚਿੰਤਾ ਸਿਮਰਿ ਅਨੰਤਾ ਸਾਗਰੁ ਤਰਿਆ ਭਾਈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: mitt gee chintaa simar anantaa saagar tariaa bhaaee |1|
lines.english: My anxiety was dispelled, meditating in remembrance on the Infinite Lord; I have crossed over the world ocean, O Siblings of Destiny. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਿਰਦੈ ਹਰਿ ਕੇ ਚਰਣ ਵਸਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: hiradai har ke charan vasaaee |
lines.english: I enshrine the Lord's Feet within my heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਸਹਜ ਧੁਨਿ ਉਪਜੀ ਰੋਗਾ ਘਾਣਿ ਮਿਟਾਈ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: sukh paaeaa sehaj dhun upajee rogaa ghaan mittaaee | rahaau |
lines.english: I have found peace, and the celestial sound current resounds within me; countless diseases have been eradicated. ||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਆ ਗੁਣ ਤੇਰੇ ਆਖਿ ਵਖਾਣਾ ਕੀਮਤਿ ਕਹਣੁ ਨ ਜਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: kiaa gun tere aakh vakhaanaa keemat kehan na jaaee |
lines.english: Which of Your Glorious Virtues can I speak and describe? Your worth cannot be estimated.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਰਠਿ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: soratth mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Sorat'h, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਏ ਕਲੇਸ ਰੋਗ ਸਭਿ ਨਾਸੇ ਪ੍ਰਭਿ ਅਪੁਨੈ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਧਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: ge kales rog sabh naase prabh apunai kirapaa dhaaree |
lines.english: My sufferings have come to an end, and all diseases have been eradicated.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਭਗਤ ਭਏ ਅਬਿਨਾਸੀ ਅਪੁਨਾ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਭਇਆ ਸਹਾਈ ॥੨॥੧੩॥੪੧॥
lines.translit: naanak bhagat bhe abinaasee apunaa prabh bheaa sahaaee |2|13|41|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Lord's devotees become imperishable and immortal; their God becomes their friend and support. ||2||13||41||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਠ ਪਹਰ ਆਰਾਧਹੁ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਪੂਰਨ ਘਾਲ ਹਮਾਰੀ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: aatth pehar aaraadhahu suaamee pooran ghaal hamaaree |1|
lines.english: God has showered me with His Grace. Twenty-four hours a day, I worship and adore my Lord and Master; my efforts have come to fruition. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਖਿ ਲੈਹੁ ਭਾਈ ਮੇਰੇ ਕਉ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਆਗੈ ਅਰਦਾਸਿ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: raakh laihu bhaaee mere kau prabh aagai aradaas | rahaau |
lines.english: Please, save me, O my Beloved! I offer this prayer to my God. ||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਮਾਗਉ ਸੋਈ ਸੋਈ ਪਾਵਉ ਅਪਨੇ ਖਸਮ ਭਰੋਸਾ ॥
lines.translit: jo maagau soee soee paavau apane khasam bharosaa |
lines.english: Whatever I ask for, I receive; I have total faith in my Master.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜੀਉ ਤੂ ਸੁਖ ਸੰਪਤਿ ਰਾਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: har jeeo too sukh sanpat raas |
lines.english: O Dear Lord, You are my peace, wealth and capital.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰੁ ਪੂਰਾ ਭੇਟਿਓ ਮਿਟਿਓ ਸਗਲ ਅੰਦੇਸਾ ॥੨॥੧੪॥੪੨॥
lines.translit: kahu naanak gur pooraa bhettio mittio sagal andesaa |2|14|42|
lines.english: Says Nanak, I have met with the Perfect Guru, and all my fears have been dispelled. ||2||14||42||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਰਠਿ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: soratth mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Sorat'h, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾਪ ਰੋਗ ਗਏ ਗੁਰ ਬਚਨੀ ਮਨ ਇਛੇ ਫਲ ਪਾਇਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: taap rog ge gur bachanee man ichhe fal paaeaa |1|
lines.english: The fever and the disease are gone, through the Word of the Guru's Teachings, and I have obtained the fruits of my mind's desires. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਮਰਿ ਸਿਮਰਿ ਗੁਰੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਅਪਨਾ ਸਗਲਾ ਦੂਖੁ ਮਿਟਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: simar simar gur satigur apanaa sagalaa dookh mittaaeaa |
lines.english: Meditating, meditating in remembrance on my Guru, the True Guru, all pains have been eradicated.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰਾ ਗੁਰੁ ਪੂਰਾ ਸੁਖਦਾਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: meraa gur pooraa sukhadaataa |
lines.english: My Perfect Guru is the Giver of peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਣ ਕਾਰਣ ਸਮਰਥ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਪੂਰਨ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਬਿਧਾਤਾ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: karan kaaran samarath suaamee pooran purakh bidhaataa | rahaau |
lines.english: He is the Doer, the Cause of causes, the Almighty Lord and Master, the Perfect Primal Lord, the Architect of Destiny. ||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨੰਦ ਬਿਨੋਦ ਮੰਗਲ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵਹੁ ਗੁਰ ਨਾਨਕ ਭਏ ਦਇਆਲਾ ॥
lines.translit: anand binod mangal gun gaavahu gur naanak bhe deaalaa |
lines.english: Sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord in bliss, joy and ecstasy; Guru Nanak has become kind and compassionate.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਮਰੀ ਗਣਤ ਨ ਗਣੀਆ ਕਾਈ ਅਪਣਾ ਬਿਰਦੁ ਪਛਾਣਿ ॥
lines.translit: hamaree ganat na ganeea kaaee apanaa birad pachhaan |
lines.english: He did not take my accounts into account; such is His forgiving nature.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਰਠਿ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: soratth mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Sorat'h, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੈ ਜੈ ਕਾਰ ਭਏ ਜਗ ਭੀਤਰਿ ਹੋਆ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਰਖਵਾਲਾ ॥੨॥੧੫॥੪੩॥
lines.translit: jai jai kaar bhe jag bheetar hoaa paarabraham rakhavaalaa |2|15|43|
lines.english: Shouts of cheers and congratulations ring out all over the world; the Supreme Lord God has become my Savior and Protector. ||2||15||43||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਾਥ ਦੇਇ ਰਾਖੇ ਕਰਿ ਅਪੁਨੇ ਸਦਾ ਸਦਾ ਰੰਗੁ ਮਾਣਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: haath dee raakhe kar apune sadaa sadaa rang maan |1|
lines.english: He gave me His hand, and saved me and made me His own; forever and ever, I enjoy His Love. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਚਾ ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਸਦ ਮਿਹਰਵਾਣ ॥
lines.translit: saachaa saahib sad miharavaan |
lines.english: The True Lord and Master is forever merciful and forgiving.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੰਧੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਮੇਰੈ ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਪੂਰੈ ਹੋਈ ਸਰਬ ਕਲਿਆਣ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: bandh paaeaa merai satigur poorai hoee sarab kaliaan | rahaau |
lines.english: My Perfect Guru has bound me to Him, and now, I am in absolute ecstasy. ||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਉ ਪਾਇ ਪਿੰਡੁ ਜਿਨਿ ਸਾਜਿਆ ਦਿਤਾ ਪੈਨਣੁ ਖਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: jeeo paae pindd jin saajiaa ditaa painan khaan |
lines.english: The One who fashioned the body and placed the soul within, who gives you clothing and nourishment

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਪਣੇ ਦਾਸ ਕੀ ਆਪਿ ਪੈਜ ਰਾਖੀ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਦ ਕੁਰਬਾਣੁ ॥੨॥੧੬॥੪੪॥
lines.translit: apane daas kee aap paij raakhee naanak sad kurabaan |2|16|44|
lines.english: - He Himself preserves the honor of His slaves. Nanak is forever a sacrifice to Him. ||2||16||44||
